query:
SELECT o.id, o.orderNumber, o.orderStatus, o.customerName, u.name as userName, st.stamps, st.action, st.userId
FROM stamp_transactions st
JOIN orders o ON st.orderId = o.id
LEFT JOIN users u ON st.userId = u.id
WHERE o.orderStatus = 'cancelled' AND st.action = 'earn';
